MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY FLORENCIA CARDENAS C/O LAW OFFICES K.J. PETSAS, PC AS TO DEFENDANT AOAY, FAINA AOAY, KRIYSTAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-20-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FLORENCIA CARDENAS C/O LAW OFFICES K.J. PETSAS, PC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AOAY, FAINA AOAY, KRIYSTAL $2,026.50 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,206.50, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $2384.12; AND ATTRIBUTES 15% COMPARATIVE NEGLIGENCE TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
